Giga Chat AI

Processing and sending responses to requests to the AI model.

Module of the GigaChatAI.

class gigachatai.GigaChatAI(bot, call_query, mysql_data, admin_id)[source]

Class of the helper for the users and admin - GigaChat.

Parameters:

  • call_query (CallbackQuery) –

  • mysql_data (dict) –

  • admin_id (int) –

__giga_version_1(call_query)

Handler of the callback query by click on the btn1: LightVersion of GigaChat.

Parameters:

call_query (CallbackQuery) – Query (by click on the button) with callback.

Returns:

None.

Return type:

None

__giga_version_2(call_query)

Handler of the callback query by click on the btn1: PROVersion of GigaChat.

Parameters:

call_query (CallbackQuery) – Query (by click on the button) with callback.

Returns:

None.

Return type:

None

__say_thanks(call_query)

Function counter/sender for count_of_thanks_from_users.

Parameters:

call_query (CallbackQuery) – Callback Query.

Returns:

None.

Return type:

None

request(message)[source]

Request from the user, handler of the buttons and register callback-query.

Parameters:

message (Message) – User message.

Returns:

None.

Return type:

None
